BuyWhere Price Widget

Embeddable price comparison widget for external sites

Layouts

Quick Start

1. Add the script

<script src="https://buywhere.io/widgets/price-widget.js"></script>

2. Add container div

<div id="my-widget"></div>

3. Initialize widget

<script>
BuyWhereWidget.create('my-widget', {
    query: 'Apple AirPods Pro',  // or asin: 'B0CHX1W7V2'
    theme: 'light',               // 'light' or 'dark'
    layout: 'full',              // 'full' or 'compact'
    country: 'US',               // US, SG, MY, ID, VN, PH
    apiKey: 'your_api_key',      // optional
    linkText: 'View on BuyWhere'
});
</script>

Or use data attributes (no JS)

<div id="my-widget"
     data-bw-widget-init
     data-bw-query="Apple AirPods Pro"
     data-bw-theme="light"
     data-bw-layout="full"
     data-bw-country="US">
</div>

Configuration Options

{
    // Product search query (use instead of asin)
    query: 'string',

    // Amazon ASIN (use instead of query)
    asin: 'B0CHX1W7V2',

    // Theme: 'light' or 'dark'
    theme: 'light',

    // Layout: 'full' (shows all prices) or 'compact' (cheapest only)
    layout: 'full',

    // Country: US, SG, MY, ID, VN, PH (default: US)
    country: 'US',

    // BuyWhere API key (optional for demo)
    apiKey: 'string',

    // Text for the link to BuyWhere
    linkText: 'View on BuyWhere',

    // Currency for price display
    currency: 'USD',

    // API base URL
    apiBase: 'https://api.buywhere.io',

    // Max results to fetch
    maxResults: 3
}
